daily.today_energy: Your vibe is magnetic rn—conversations flowing, ideas sparkling. Mercury's got your back, so lean into that silver-tongue energy. People are genuinely drawn to whatever you're putting out.
daily.love: Someone's noticing the way you light up today. Whether you're coupled or single, authenticity is your love language rn. Real talk hits different when you're just being yourself.
daily.career: Trust those random ideas popping into your head—they're not random. Your intuition's running hot on projects and people. Speak up about what you see; your perspective matters more than you think.
daily.health: Your nervous system's asking for presence. Ground yourself with something tactile—tea, a walk, your hands in dirt. Movement over intensity; flow over force. You'll feel the shift immediately.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is asking you to slow down and actually listen to what people are saying instead of already planning your response. Mercury's got your back, but the real magic happens when you practice presence over performance.
weekly.love: Whether you're single or coupled up, this is a week to be honest about what you actually want versus what sounds good on paper. Someone might surprise you with genuine effort—notice it.
weekly.career: Your ideas are valuable, but timing matters more than you think. Before pitching that thing, vibe-check the room first. Small moves this week set up bigger momentum later.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for consistency over intensity right now. Skip the extreme stuff and lean into what actually feels sustainable. Rest isn't lazy, it's strategic.
